title: Congress holds strategy meet over GBA polls, DKS says ‘new guarantees for Bengaluru’ on May 13
description: This announcement comes a day after Mr. Shivakumar, who is also Karnataka Pradesh Congress Committee (KPCC) President, held a meeting with Chief Minister Siddaramaiah and All India Congress Committee (AICC) general secretary Randeep Surjewala, in charge of party affairs in the State on Sunday. Mr. Shivakumar described it as a ‘political meeting’
